items.title: The 'We'll Drive A Funky Ehhh' Meme Explained
'Corny On The Bob' A Rising TikTok Meme Thanks To This TikToker's Excellent Meal Showcase Videos
items.summary:
Corny On the Bob refers to a series of memes and video edits of TikToker Patty Miller (@pattyzapfemiller) calling corn and corn on the cob "corny on the bob" while showing off what she's eating for her meals.

Videos of Patty calling corn on the cob "corny on the bob," and calling corn off the cob "corny off the bob," date back as early as May 2025. Clips of her using the term were popularized as the subject of memes and edits in June and July 2026, including edits that attach an image of SpongeBob as a fish with corn on his head as a representation of "corny on the bob."

As the meme evolved, people began using the image of SpongeBob and the corn in other memes referencing the original videos.

items.title: For Over A Decade, This 'Billy Madison' Scene Has Been A Popular Reaction Meme For Adults Who Love Kids' Movies
items.summary:
Adam Sandler Sitting With Kids or Billy Madison Sitting In First Grade Classroom is a reaction image and exploitable image macro meme format based on a scene from the 1995 Adam Sandler film Billy Madison where Billy Madison sits in his first-grade classroom for story time, surrounded by his classmates, children.

The image was first used as a reaction meme as early as 2014 and became increasingly popular online in the 2020s. As a meme, it is often used alongside captions about attending a movie or an event that is traditionally aimed towards children, but has a nostalgia factor that also appeals to adults, with Madison representing the adult being surrounded by children.

items.title: First Person POV 'Perfect Bleed Out Spot' Trend Being Called Out As Performative With Retaliatory Memes
items.summary:
10/10 Bleed Out Spot is a meme trend derived from the "masculine urge to bleed out here" memes where people share their perfect spots to bleed out and die under the caption, "10/10 bleed out spot." A perfect bleed out spot is often suggested to be a place where it would be aesthetically pleasing, poetic and peaceful to bleed to death, with many 10/10 bleed out spots featuring snow.

The trend began as early as October 2025 and became increasingly popular on sites including Instagram, TikTok and X / Twitter throughout 2026. In July 2026, a related meme about "10/10 bleed out spot guys" stubbing their toes and panicking went viral, highlighting a perceived performativeness in the trend.

items.title: Restaurant's Using AI Food Images Sparks Viral Debate On Twitter
items.summary:
AI Restaurant Food Images or AI Food Images Debate refers to viral online discourse and debates surrounding restaurants' (or other food-related businesses') use of AI-generated food images in menus, storefront signage, social media posts and delivery app listings. As generative AI image tools became more accessible in the mid-2020s, restaurants increasingly began using artificial intelligence images instead of real photographs to advertise menu items, prompting widespread criticism online.

The discussion gained significant traction on X / Twitter in mid-July 2026, with many users arguing that AI-generated food appeared uncanny, overly glossy or otherwise unappetizing, while others criticized the images for creating misleading expectations about the meals being served.

items.title: Kai Cenat And IShowSpeed's 'Ronaldo Pasta' Clip Is The Latest Brainrot Meme, Courtesy Of MrBeast
items.summary:
Ronaldo Pasta is a series of memes based on a clip from a MrBeast video where streamer Kai Cenat serves streamer IShowSpeed a plate of "Ronaldo Pasta," a pasta dish inspired by IShowSpeed's favorite football player, Cristiano Ronaldo.

The clip originates from a challenge in the July 2024 video "50 YouTubers Fight For $1,000,000," where contestants must cook a dish and serve it to judges, one of the judges being Speed. It first became the subject of edits in July 2025, and was popularized as a meme, including a "brainrot": meme, in July 2026 on TikTok and Instagram Reels.
